description:
NAVI AI Sdn Bhd
（www.navi.com.my）
is an AI-Native tech company building AI Agentic solutions across EdTech, PropTech, F&B, and healthcare. We're looking for a Gen AI & Full Stack Developer to work on our proprietary AI Multi-Agent Framework and a Smart Hardware IoT product. You'll be integrating LLM APIs, building backend services in Python and Laravel, developing frontend dashboards in React/Vue, and contributing to mobile and cloud infrastructure.
Requirements
Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field, or equivalent practical experience
Proficient in PHP & Laravel (routing, Eloquent ORM, queues, middleware, migrations)
Strong Python 3.11+ skills with modern Python features
Experienced with PostgreSQL and MySQL including schema design and query optimisation
Solid frontend fundamentals with React or Vue (at least one)
Proficient in Git for branch management and team collaboration
Experience with RESTful API design and authentication (Bearer Token, OAuth)
Bonus Skills
LLM/AI development (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama APIs)
RAG, MCP, Prompt & Context Engineering
FastAPI, Docker, AWS, WebSocket/SSE
React Native mobile development
IoT/embedded communication (MQTT, GPS, OTA)
